Terrain Basemap

The terrain basemap highlights elevation and landforms using shaded relief and elevation data.

Characteristics

  • Elevation shading
  • 3D compatibility
  • Emphasises slopes and relief

Best Use Cases

  • Topography analysis
  • Watershed understanding
  • Flood modelling context

Limitations

  • Less useful for urban navigation
  • Limited labeling

Suggested Images

  • Mountain terrain
  • Elevation shading example
